description_long: This is a rustic wooden fence composed of three horizontal rails supported by two vertical posts at either end. The rails and posts are irregularly shaped, giving the fence a natural, handcrafted appearance, with each rail slightly curved and uneven. The wood appears dark and weathered, suggesting outdoor use and exposure to the elements. There are no visible decorative elements, caps, or embellishments, and the construction is simple and functional. The fence is relatively low in height, suitable for marking boundaries or providing a visual barrier in parks, gardens, or along sidewalks. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing function over ornamentation.
description: A rustic, dark wooden fence with three uneven horizontal rails and two sturdy vertical posts, featuring a simple, handcrafted look.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three horizontal rails and both vertical posts, highlighting the irregular, natural wood shapes.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the alignment of the rails and posts.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same three rails and two posts with visible wood texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the narrow profile and the thickness of the wooden elements.
